prose:
Frontier-orbital energies of TEMPO (nitroxide radical)

Method provenance
1. Property: frontier orbital energies and Koopmans-derived IP/EA; HOMO–LUMO gap reported in eV.
2. Level of theory: DFT, tier ‘standard’ = B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RI (density fitting) as implemented in PySCF.
3. Geometry provenance: single-point on the supplied /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz (29 atoms); no further relaxation.
4. Solvent/environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
5. Charge 0, multiplicity 2 (open-shell UKS doublet).
6. Software: PySCF via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill.
7. Convergence/caveats: SCF converged in 12 cycles; no warnings reported; integrity.status = ok.

Selected results (exact values from chemkit)
• HOMO energy  −6.3375439 eV (index 86)
• LUMO energy  −2.4651235 eV (index 87)
• HOMO–LUMO gap  3.8724203 eV  ← headline value reported below
• Vertical IP 6.3375439 eV; vertical EA 2.4651235 eV

Reproducibility
• Command: chemkit frontier-orbitals --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 2 tempo.xyz
• Live .out log was streamed to a file in the working directory while running and is retained for inspection.

No warnings were reported by chemkit. All data are computed; provenance: computed.
